body.title: ToolRegistry proxy — per-tool call rates, failures, latency
body.result: Added ToolStats dataclass (call count, error count, p50/p95 latency with 1000-sample cap) to registry.py. ToolRegistry.execute() now wraps all calls with timing and success/error tracking. New get_tool_registry_report tool in tools/metrics.py exposes the data to Igor. 17 new tests (199 total). No changes to reasoners needed — stats collected at the dispatch layer.
body.description: Tools fire with no observability layer. Need aggregate view: per-tool call count, error rate, p50/p95 latency. Hook into basal_ganglia dispatch path. Feeds /audit thread-hygiene check.
